The '''Bakura task force''' was a small fleet of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] dispatched from the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Endor fleet]] to assist the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] world of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in repelling the [[Ssi-ruu]]vi invasion force of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="ec">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref>

The task force was not given an operational name or sign, and consisted of the modified [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|starfighter carrier]] ''[[Flurry]]'', one [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], five [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunships]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and twenty [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] (including survivors of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]). Because the task force was so hastily assembled, its four [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] did not have time to complete their maintenance overhauls.<ref name="tabs">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>

At the [[Invasion of Bakura]], the task force lost ''Flurry'' and several starfighters. It was subsequently absorbed back into the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].<ref name="tabs" />
